attributes.additional_details: plus The average Euro to British Pound exchange rate for the last six months was approximately 1 Euro = 0.8695 pence  so for every £1000 savings we would lose  £140. The government cannot just rejoin and hope nobody noticed or keep having referendums until they get the desired result
attributes.background: Rejoining the EU would cause economic uncertainties ,require compliance with EU regulations,lead to an increase in immigration,increase UK energy costs raise expenses for British manufacturers and consumers.

rejection.details: Rejoining the EU is not current Government policy - and this petition appears to conflate that with joining the Euro-zone.
